_comment: Subjects + prompts for programmatic art generation. Filenames map to in-game ids; the runtime auto-discovers them via src/assetManifest.js. Global 'style' keeps the set cohesive (bright/friendly/realistic).
style: Bright, warm, friendly fantasy creature art with a semi-realistic, highly detailed render; soft natural daylight, vibrant cheerful colours, gentle approachable expression; clean readable silhouette on a simple soft light background; polished cohesive game art; no text, no watermark; original creature design that does not resemble any existing franchise

subjects.cindermaw: friendly 3/4 portrait of a stocky, sturdy boulder-bodied drake with warm earthy-amber scaly hide and softly glowing golden seams, rounded rocky back plates, short sturdy wings, big warm amber eyes, gentle happy expression
subjects.quilldart: friendly 3/4 portrait of a sleek bright-azure drake with a colourful fan of golden tail-quills and tidy swept-back head spines, lean graceful build, big bright cyan eyes, cheerful expression
subjects.pyrewing: friendly 3/4 portrait of a spirited warm-crimson drake with a soft glowing orange underglow (not on fire), gently curved horns, broad open wings, big friendly orange eyes, playful expression
subjects.tw_voidwing: friendly 3/4 portrait of a majestic midnight-black drake with sleek scales and large ear-like flaps, powerful build, big glowing pale-blue eyes, noble gentle expression
subjects.tw_glaciarch: friendly 3/4 portrait of a colossal pale-blue tidal drake with crystalline ice tusks and frosted scales, big kind eyes, serene majestic expression
subjects.tw_skydancer: friendly 3/4 portrait of a regal four-winged drake with feather-like teal-and-gold wings folded like a cloak, owlish face, big bright eyes, graceful expression
subjects.tw_magmaback: friendly 3/4 portrait of a huge sturdy drake armoured in cooled-lava rocky plates glowing with golden cracks, broad friendly face, warm amber eyes
subjects.tw_stormfang: friendly 3/4 portrait of a violet storm drake with crackling soft-blue energy along its spines, sleek build, bright eyes, spirited expression
subjects.tw_cinderwyrm: friendly 3/4 portrait of a large orange-red drake with a warm glowing ember mantle along neck and back (not on fire), broad wings, big friendly eyes
subjects.tw_prismscale: friendly 3/4 portrait of an iridescent rainbow-scaled drake with a shifting colourful sheen and frills, big curious eyes, cheerful expression

subjects.gloomborer: friendly 3/4 portrait of a sturdy grey-brown burrowing drake with a spiral-ridged drilling snout and a round armoured body, small eyes, determined friendly look
subjects.venomstinger: friendly 3/4 portrait of a dark-red insectoid drake with a curled scorpion-like tail and sleek armoured plates, big alert eyes, watchful expression
subjects.tideshell: friendly 3/4 portrait of a teal sea drake carrying a large rounded shell on its back, stubby limbs, big gentle eyes, calm expression
subjects.sparkmaw: friendly 3/4 portrait of a purple-blue drake crackling with little yellow sparks, sleek build, big bright eyes, lively cheerful expression

subjects.emberprism: friendly 3/4 portrait of a red-orange drake with subtle multicolour glints in its scales and frills, big curious eyes, clever cheerful expression
subjects.quakehide: friendly 3/4 portrait of a round armoured earth-brown drake that can curl like a boulder, thick plated hide, small friendly eyes, sturdy look

subjects.berk: wide cinematic establishing shot of a cosy cliffside harbour town (Holtgard) in warm golden morning light, longhouses and gentle chimney smoke above a bright blue sea, clear friendly sky, no characters
subjects.dragons_edge: wide cinematic establishing shot of a sea-stack outpost (Stormwatch Spire) in bright soft daylight with light fluffy clouds, wooden platforms ringing a tall rock spire, calm blue sea, no characters
